REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT DEFENDANT RICARDO GALDAMEZ'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND TO VACATE THE DEFAULT IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. MOTION TO VACATE BASED ON CCP 473.5 IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT TO FILE AN ANSWER NO LATER THAN AUGUST 12, 2020 BY 5:00 P.M. MOTION TO QUASH IS DENIED. DEFENDANT WAS SERVED BY A REGISTERED PROCESS SERVER AND FAILED TO PROVIDE SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO REBUT THE PRESUMPTION AFFORDED TO A REGISTERED PROCESS SERVER. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE CHARLES F. HAINES, CLERK: W. TRUPEK, NOT REPORTED (D501)

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Aug-12-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant DEFENDANT RICARDO GALDAMEZ's Motion to Quash Service of Summons and to Vacate the Default is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion to Vacate based on CCP 473.5 is GRANTED. Defendant to file an answer no later than August 12, 2020 by 5:00 p.m. Motion to Quash is DENIED. Defendant was served by a registered process server and failed to provide sufficient evidence to rebut the presumption afforded to a registered process server. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: W. Trupek, Not reported (D501)
